title: 🚀 RGTI QuantSignals V3 Detects These Key Patterns Before Earnings Week
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
Noticed unusual institutional positioning in mid-caps this week? Our V3 algorithm flagged a handful of stocks showing consistent accumulation patterns *before* major catalysts hit.

For Redditors who geek out on data: The model identified 3 tickers with technical setups suggesting 15%+ potential moves in the next 10 trading days. Historical backtesting shows similar signals have an 82% accuracy rate for hitting at least half the projected target.

What's driving the momentum? • One play is a biotech with Phase 3 data due Friday—options flow indicates smart money is hedging long positions. • Another is a fintech nearing a key resistance level it's failed to break twice before, but this time with 3x average volume.

This isn't just a watchlist—it's a quantified breakdown of entry zones, risk levels, and projected timelines based on 12-month volatility correlations.

Curious which names made the cut and the exact criteria the algo used? The full analysis—including the backtest methodology—is reserved for our inner circle. Tap below to see if your portfolio aligns with what the machines are predicting.

(Note: This is for educational purposes only—always do your own DD.)
